task: add a comment to the top of src/app/api/health/route.ts describing what this route does

data.plan: Add a descriptive comment at the top of src/app/api/health/route.ts explaining that this route serves as a health check endpoint, typically used to verify the API server is running and responsive. No functional code changes will be made.
acceptanceCriteria: A comment is added at the very top of the file before any imports or code
The comment accurately describes the purpose of the health check route (e.g., verifying the server is running and returning a 200 OK response)
No existing code, imports, or functionality is altered
The file remains valid TypeScript after the change
